name: What's my back injury at work case worth in Boise?
description: Idaho avg $740k for severe back; get impairment rating.

mainEntity.name: What's my back injury at work case worth in Boise?

acceptedAnswer.text: Idaho avg $740k for severe back; get impairment rating.
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Varies: average Idaho neck/back settlements ~$740k, median $362k, but comp caps apply.**

Depends on severity, lost wages, impairment rating; severe cases hit millions.[7] Comp limits to medicals, TTD, PPI.

- Mild: $10k-$50k.
- Surgery/permanent: $100k+.
- Total disability: higher.

Get rated by doctor; attorney negotiates max vs. insurer lowballs.[7]
